title: 846639 Fuel Shut-Off Solenoid Kit, Replacement for 282H00 283H00, Replacement for JD L108 LA115, Replacement for BS 356777 Engine 21R772 21R777, Replaces 356777
features: Fitment: Replacement for 282H00 283H00 284H00, Replacement for JD L107 L108 LA115, Replacement for BS 356777 Engine 21R772 21R777 295777. Please refer to the product description below for more compatible models

Suitable for a Variety of Equipment: The solenoid valve is not only suitable for horticultural equipment, but also for a variety of small engines, which meets the needs of different users and improves the working efficiency of the equipment

Simple Installation: Designed with the user experience in mind, the installation process is simple and intuitive, even for non-professionals, saving time and effort, and quickly restoring the normal operation of the equipment
Package Includes: 1 x Fuel Solenoid 1 x Cable 1 x Fuel Filter 4 x Clip and others as show as picture
description: Product Description Fuel Shut-Off Solenoid Kit Fuel Shut-Off Solenoid Kit Package Includes: 1 x Fuel Solenoid 1 x Cable 1 x Fuel Filter 4 x Clip and others as show as picture Fuel Shut-Off Solenoid Kit Reliable Fuel Shutoff Solenoid This fuel shut-off solenoid ensures proper engine fuel control for small engines. It suits various horticultural and small equipment, improving operation efficiency. The user-friendly design allows easy self-installation without professional skills. Fuel Control User Friendly Essential Component Function Ensure Fitment: Replacement for JD 46, L107, L108, LA115, LA125, 107S, 115 Replacement for JD D 105, D110, E100, E110, L100, S100, S110 R eplacement for JD X106, X107, X117R, X120, X125, X126, X145 R eplacement for BS 356777 Engine 2 1R772, 21R777, 295777, 21R702, 21R706, 21R707 Fitment: Replacement for BS 31C707, 31E677, 31G777, 305772, 305777, 31A507, 31A607, 282H00, 283H00, 284H00, 285H00, 286H00, 287700, 28AH00, 28BH00 R eplacement for 28CH00, 280H00, 280J00, 281H00, 3 1H700, 31K700, 31L700, 31M700, 31N700, 31P700 R eplacement for 3 1C700, 31D700, 31E600, 31E700, 31F700, 31G700 Fitment: Replacement for 31Q700, 31X700, 31A500, 31A600, 31A700, 31B700, 31R907-0018-G1, 33S877-0014-G1 Replacement for 3 3R877-0009-G1, 33R877-0032-G1, 33R877-0033-G1, 31R907-0062-G1 R eplacement for 3 3R777-0009-G1, 33S877-0015-G1, 331977-0004-G1, 33R777-0003-G1, 33R777-0012-G1 Product Description: Replaces Part Number: 846639, 356777, AUC11057 ​Function: Fuel Shut-Off Solenoid Item Dimensions L x W x H: 10 x 8 x 5 centimetres Weight: Lightweight for Easy Handling Note: Fuel Quality: Always use clean fuel to prevent clogging of the fuel filter. Contaminants may reduce the solenoid's performance. Temperature Range: Do not operate in extremely low or high temperatures beyond normal engine operating limits, as this may affect functionality. Installation Precautions: Ensure all components are securely attached. Loose parts may cause fuel leakage or improper operation. Proper Fit: Confirm the solenoid is installed in the correct orientation as shown in the product images to ensure proper function.
